steps.title: Evaluate the inner function
steps.content:
Start by evaluating the inner function at the requested input.
$$g(-9)=|12(-9)-7|$$
$$g(-9)=|-108-7|=|-115|=115$$

steps.title: Evaluate the outer function
steps.content:
Use $g(-9)=115$ in the formula for $f$.
$$f(-9)=4(115)-3$$
$$f(-9)=460-3=457$$
The answer is D.
